## 4. Environment Standardization
Use the provided `experiments/hardware.md` as a template for recording the specific environment of any research run.
This document defines the standards for implementing and describing "Skills" (Tools) within the MemoraRAG RAG system to ensure stable intent routing and neutral semantics.
Generate a response for a given prompt with a provided model. This is a streaming endpoint.
vLLM is a high-throughput and memory-efficient inference and serving engine for LLMs.
Generate the next message in a chat with a provided model.
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems integrate retrieval mechanisms with LLMs to enhance accuracy by grounding responses in external information.
